content: Hello! Welcome to my website. How can I assist you today?
does he have any udemy certificates

Yes, I do have some certificates from Udemy. They focus primarily on areas related to AI, including topics like Claude Code, Agentic AI, LLM Engineering, and practical applications of Agentic AI in production. If you're interested in specifics about these courses or how they relate to my work, feel free to ask!
can you give dates on any of these udemy certificates
The Udemy certificates were obtained in 2026. If you need any specific information about the courses or their content, let me know!
Did he do  any udemy courses on Claude code?   did he complete them? do you have dates ?

Yes, I completed Udemy courses on Claude Code, as well as other related topics like Agentic AI and LLM Engineering. These were all completed in 2026. If you need more detailed information about the content of these courses or how they apply to my work, feel free to ask!

I haven't specifically mentioned any courses on HCX in my background, but I have practical experience working with HCX during my recent role at DXC, where I was involved in the migration of large Government applications into a secure hybrid cloud platform. If you're looking for information on how HCX fits into my work or any specific details, just let me know!
